title: Tallera Open
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Tallera Open''' was a [[Ronto/Legends|ronto]]-racing competition held in the [[Tallera Downs]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Nubia/Legends|Nubia]].
